summary: All 149 PRD features are now implemented. The 4 previously missing features have been verified as fully implemented: (1) EditTemplateModal.jsx with template selector, propagation warning/checkbox, visual diff, PUT /api/classes/:id/propagate and GET /api/classes/templates backend routes, plus UI buttons in Classes.jsx header and context menu; (2) Natural Language Scheduling in MissionControl.jsx with ScheduledTasksList (list/toggle/delete), GET/DELETE/PUT /scheduled-tasks routes in agents.js, and processScheduledTasks()/processTaskQueue() in aiDaemon.js reading from scheduled_agent_tasks table; (3) Chronic no-show auto-flag in healerAgent.js with 3+ consecutive no-show query + chronic_no_show staff_task creation at high priority; (4) Pause return alert in healerAgent.js checking pause_end within 7 days + pause_return_alert staff_task creation.
